title: The Delayed Flight
content: Marcus arrived at the airport early for his business trip, expecting a calm and simple journey. However, shortly after checking in, he noticed large crowds gathering near the departure screens. His flight had been delayed because of a severe storm in another city. Hours passed slowly inside the crowded airport terminal. Marcus drank expensive coffee, answered work emails, and watched travelers complain at the service desk. Eventually, the airline announced another delay, forcing him to change his meeting schedule completely. By the time he finally boarded the plane late that night, Marcus felt exhausted. Still, as the plane rose above the clouds, he felt relieved that the long day was finally ending.
